query: We only have app code right now. Please set up Docusaurus docs from scratch in this repo and keep nav/sidebar artifacts in sync after initialization.
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes an implicit natural-language docs bootstrap + sync request for an existing codebase
Agent interprets this as equivalent to init-sync behavior even without explicit init-sync keywords
Agent routes through auto classification to Mode I (Init) with docusaurus as the requested framework
Agent loads references/init-sync-existing-repos.md and references/docusaurus.md to guide non-destructive bootstrap and sync
Agent executes init-sync behavior by running Mode C (Sync) and Mode E (Maintain) checks after scaffold
